# FIXTURE: Kohl's "order updated" / partial cancel email (real email, captured 2026-07-05 via Gmail web)

# subject: Joshua, your Kohl's order has been updated.
# date: 2026-06-28 18:02 (one of FOUR same-subject messages that day — Gmail threads them
#   together; parser MUST process per-message, never per-thread)
# note: order number is in BODY only, not subject. Recommendations section and footer trimmed.
# LEGO set numbers are embedded in product names; SKU is Kohl's internal.
